_comment: Verbatim reportTransaction XML body wrapped as a JSON string for the JSON-only fixtures convention. Field names are illustrative (BLOCKED(verify): the live XML schema is not published). Amounts use pt-BR comma decimals to exercise the parser.
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<report publisherId="654321">
  <transaction>
    <id>500001</id>
    <storeId>2001</storeId>
    <storeName>Loja Exemplo Eletronicos</storeName>
    <status>Pendente</status>
    <saleValue>1299,90</saleValue>
    <commission>64,99</commission>
    <currency>BRL</currency>
    <transactionDate>2026-05-20T10:15:00Z</transactionDate>
    <clickDate>2026-05-20T10:00:00Z</clickDate>
  </transaction>
  <transaction>
    <id>500002</id>
    <storeId>2001</storeId>
    <storeName>Loja Exemplo Eletronicos</storeName>
    <status>Aprovada</status>
    <saleValue>199,90</saleValue>
    <commission>9,99</commission>
    <currency>BRL</currency>
    <transactionDate>2026-04-01T09:30:00Z</transactionDate>
    <validationDate>2026-04-10T12:00:00Z</validationDate>
  </transaction>
  <transaction>
    <id>500003</id>
    <storeId>2002</storeId>
    <storeName>Livraria Exemplo</storeName>
    <status>Cancelada</status>
    <saleValue>49,90</saleValue>
    <commission>2,50</commission>
    <currency>BRL</currency>
    <transactionDate>2026-05-05T14:20:00Z</transactionDate>
    <validationDate>2026-05-12T09:00:00Z</validationDate>
    <reason>Pedido cancelado pelo cliente</reason>
  </transaction>
  <transaction>
    <id>500004</id>
    <storeId>2002</storeId>
    <storeName>Livraria Exemplo</storeName>
    <status>Paga</status>
    <saleValue>80,00</saleValue>
    <commission>8,00</commission>
    <currency>BRL</currency>
    <transactionDate>2026-03-15T08:00:00Z</transactionDate>
    <validationDate>2026-03-20T08:00:00Z</validationDate>
    <paidDate>2026-04-15T00:00:00Z</paidDate>
  </transaction>
</report>
